description_long: This is a stylized adult female figure with a confident stance, arms slightly outstretched and legs apart. She has long, voluminous hair that frames her face and falls past her shoulders. Her outfit consists of a fitted bodysuit with a distinctive chest emblem, gloves, boots, and a sash tied at the waist, all designed in a superhero or comic book style. The suit features a high collar and is form-fitting, accentuating the athletic build of the figure. The gloves and boots are knee-high and elbow-length, respectively, and the sash drapes down one side of her hip. The overall appearance is dynamic and heroic, suitable for urban or action-oriented environments.
description: A stylized adult female in a superhero-style bodysuit with gloves, boots, and a sash, standing confidently with arms outstretched. The figure has long, voluminous hair and an athletic build.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed chest emblem, facial features, and the full length of the gloves and boots.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the volume of the hair, and the drape of the sash.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the hair, the fitted suit, and the sash hanging down from the waist.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the side profile and the way the sash falls along the leg.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted bodysuit with high collar, long gloves, knee-high boots, and a waist sash in a superhero style
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
